creator: lab+bsd@thinkum.space
text:
Created attachment 237500
diff - sysutils/cinnamon-settings-daemon - updating to 5.4.5

cinnamon-settings-daemon is now available in a release 5.4.5

The attached diff will update the patches for the earlier port, removing patches that have been merged into the upstream source tree. It also updates the meson syntax for the smartcard port option, as well as updating to cinnamon-settings-daemon release 5.4.5

This patch would correspond to a patch to be published shortly, for x11/cinnamon and other ports from linuxmint in updating to a 5.4 series release
